title: Zesty's VR Pack
description:
A modpack for VR players, I use this during my stream.
Will get updated gradually, ideas though discord will be appreciate! (discord will be public soon)
body:
## Zesty's VR Pack
This is a simple modpack to bring VR into minecraft, it adds things such as VR support, QOL features and perfomance mods; any requests or issues can be sent to me on Discord!

## QOL
- Ambient Sounds
- Better Villages (ChoiceTheorem Overhauled Village)
- Better Visuals (Complementary Shaders)
- Crafting Recipies (EMI)
- Eating Animations for food (Eating Animation)
- Easy Tree Mining (FallingTree)
- Lighting work in inventory (LambDynamicLights)
- Crashes don't close Minecraft (Not Enough Crashes)
- Better footstep sounds (Presence Footsteps)
- Some mobs can spawn from the ground (Spawn Animations)
- Better and more particles (Visuality)
- Backpacks (Upgradable Backpack)

## CURRENT KNOWN ISSUES
No currently known issues.
